hero.tagline: AI Project Manager · Driving Intelligent Procurement
hero.bio: I lead AI implementation in procurement at Škoda Auto – building smarter, data-driven sourcing through automation and intelligent tools. After 11 years and the creation of Negobot, I'm convinced that the future of procurement is being written right now.

about.label: About
about.title: Connecting people, technology, and procurement.
about.text: I'm an AI Project Manager at Škoda Auto, where I lead the integration of artificial intelligence into procurement processes. With over 11 years in the company – including 7+ years driving digital transformation in Connected Car sourcing – I've developed a deep conviction: the future of purchasing is automated, intelligent, and human-centred. I believe in optimism, openness, and the power of connecting the right people.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Let's Connect
contact.subtitle: Open to collaboration, speaking opportunities, and interesting conversations about AI & innovation.
contact.name: Name
contact.success: Thank you! I'll be in touch soon.
